𝗠𝗔𝗖𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗧 | Enhancing the screenshot and screen recording workflow on macOS with advanced editing, annotation, and sharing features.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enhancing the screenshot and screen recording workflow on macOS with advanced editing, annotation, and sharing features.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Annotation tools
✅ Screen recording with video editor
✅ Scroll capture
✅ Upload to cloud services (Google Drive, S3-compatible)
✅ OCR + translation
✅ Auto-redact PII
✅ Lightweight and native macOS app
✅ GIF recording
✅ Beautify screenshots


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 139 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 64 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Macshot is a feature-rich, native macOS application for taking screenshots and recording the screen. It offers extensive annotation tools, screen recording with a built-in editor, OCR capabilities, automatic PII redaction, scroll capture, and cloud uploading, all without subscriptions and built with Swift and AppKit for a lightweight, native experience.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/sw33tLie/macshot

𝗦𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗘 | Enabling touchscreen functionality on a MacBook without dedicated hardware.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling touchscreen functionality on a MacBook without dedicated hardware.
📅 Created: Jul 2016 • Updated: Jul 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Turns MacBook into a touchscreen
✅ Uses $1 of hardware
✅ Utilizes computer vision
✅ Leverages built-in webcam
✅ Translates video feed into touch events


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 199 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 11 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Project Sistine transforms a MacBook into a functional touchscreen using minimal hardware and computer vision. It leverages the MacBook's built-in webcam and a small mirror to detect finger proximity and touches on the screen, translating them into input events.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/bijection/sistine

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗥𝗔𝗗𝗜𝗢𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗬𝗘𝗥𝗩𝟯 | Streaming music and radio content into Telegram group voice chats for continuous playback.  🔍 Worth a Look

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Streaming music and radio content into Telegram group voice chats for continuous playback.
📅 Created: Aug 2021 • Updated: Jul 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Playlist with queuing and 24/7 radio support
✅ YouTube Live stream support
✅ Auto-fallback to radio when playlist ends
✅ Persistent playback
✅ Interactive controls
✅ Download audio from YouTube
✅ Dynamic VC title updates
✅ Pre-download next tracks


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 559 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 899 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

RadioPlayerV3 is an advanced Telegram bot designed to stream music and radio directly into group voice chats. It supports playlists, YouTube live streams, and ensures persistent playback, making it ideal for continuous audio streaming in Telegram communities.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/AsmSafone/RadioPlayerV3
